assertions.expectation: Configures a recurring maintenance window for weekends only
assertions.reason: The Terraform configuration shows a recurring_window with 'FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA' and weekend scheduling mentioned multiple times

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence for weekly weekend schedule
assertions.reason: The response uses Terraform configuration but does not provide the specific gcloud commands with the required flags for maintenance window setup

assertions.expectation: Sets up maintenance exclusions for quarterly code freezes (up to 30 days each)
assertions.reason: The configuration includes quarterly_freezes with specific date ranges and dynamic maintenance_exclusion blocks for each quarter

assertions.expectation: Sets up a maintenance exclusion for the November audit period
assertions.reason: There is a specific maintenance_exclusion block for 'annual-audit-november' covering the entire month of November

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for maintenance exclusions and how to handle longer freezes
assertions.reason: The response does not mention the 30-day maximum limit for maintenance exclusions or provide guidance on handling longer freeze periods

assertions.expectation: Explains that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: The response does not explain the distinction between manual and automatic upgrades regarding maintenance windows

assertions.expectation: Recommends combining maintenance windows with Stable or Extended channel for maximum upgrade control
assertions.reason: The response does not mention GKE release channels or recommend using Stable/Extended channels for better upgrade control

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for each exclusion (--add-maintenance-exclusion-name/start-time/end-time)
assertions.reason: The response uses Python API calls and Terraform but does not provide the specific gcloud commands with the required flags for adding maintenance exclusions

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during long exclusion periods
assertions.reason: The response does not mention the risks of having extended exclusion periods and falling behind on Kubernetes versions
